title: High-Level board task management update
excerpt: I have a high-level board of my teams program of work. Each line item is the project part of the program. I want to display the latest task being worked on in the high-level board and have it automatically update this in…

posts.author: janelegall (Jane)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a high-level board of my teams program of work. Each line item is the project part of the program. I want to display the latest task being worked on in the high-level board and have it automatically update this information as I move through tasks on the low level board. Does anyone know how to do this?

posts.author: Chronosed (ALEX)
posts.cookedHtml: If you’ve already found a solution, it would be great to hear about your experience!

posts.author: Tawilleni (Tawilleni)
posts.cookedHtml:
I see your post is from two years ago, so you might have already found a solution. However, for anyone else looking for a similar solution, you can achieve this using automation tools or integrations that can sync task updates between boards.
For more information on task management tools and techniques, you can check out Online Task Management Software | Planfix. It offers features that can help streamline task management and project tracking, which might be useful for your high-level board.
